issues.description: SearchDeck filter is completely wrong. Card text specifies: look at top 5 cards, reveal up to 1 green Land of Wano type card (excluding Otama), add to hand, place rest at bottom in any order. Current filter uses cost-based search which doesn't match the effect at all.
Missing required filters: card color (green), card type (Land of Wano), exclusion (not Otama). Filter should use cardName/cardType/cardColor/excludeCardName, not cost-based filtering.
No action to handle the 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanic. This requires additional action or special handling that SearchDeck alone cannot provide.
